prompt: Ultra-realistic cinematic street fashion portrait of a stylish young woman standing beside a floor-to-ceiling glass storefront on a bustling city street at blue hour. She wears an oversized charcoal-black wool blazer over a fitted black tank top, light-wash high-waisted denim jeans, minimal silver hoop earrings, and effortless natural makeup. Her hair is loosely tied back with soft face-framing strands. She gazes confidently toward the camera with a calm editorial expression. The scene is photographed through the glass, creating layered reflections, subtle ghosting, and transparent overlays of the city. Long-exposure traffic creates vibrant red, orange, white, and teal light trails across the frame, while soft neon signs and blurred headlights produce cinematic bokeh. Mixed ambient twilight and storefront lighting illuminate the face with a gentle glow, balancing warm and cool tones. Premium luxury fashion campaign aesthetic, Vogue editorial photography, candid yet refined composition, shallow depth of field, soft film grain, realistic skin texture, optical lens reflections, natural color grading, Leica SL2-S, Summilux 50mm f/1.4, Kodak Portra 400 color palette, ultra-photorealistic, HDR, 8K, masterpiece.
promptEn: Ultra-realistic cinematic street fashion portrait of a stylish young woman standing beside a floor-to-ceiling glass storefront on a bustling city street at blue hour. She wears an oversized charcoal-black wool blazer over a fitted black tank top, light-wash high-waisted denim jeans, minimal silver hoop earrings, and effortless natural makeup. Her hair is loosely tied back with soft face-framing strands. She gazes confidently toward the camera with a calm editorial expression. The scene is photographed through the glass, creating layered reflections, subtle ghosting, and transparent overlays of the city. Long-exposure traffic creates vibrant red, orange, white, and teal light trails across the frame, while soft neon signs and blurred headlights produce cinematic bokeh. Mixed ambient twilight and storefront lighting illuminate the face with a gentle glow, balancing warm and cool tones. Premium luxury fashion campaign aesthetic, Vogue editorial photography, candid yet refined composition, shallow depth of field, soft film grain, realistic skin texture, optical lens reflections, natural color grading, Leica SL2-S, Summilux 50mm f/1.4, Kodak Portra 400 color palette, ultra-photorealistic, HDR, 8K, masterpiece.
promptZh: 超写实电影感街头时尚人像，一位时髦的年轻女性站在蓝色时刻繁华街道的落地玻璃店面旁。她身穿一件超大款 炭黑色 羊毛西装外套，内搭修身黑色背心，下着浅色高腰牛仔裤，佩戴极简银色圆环耳环，妆容自然随性。头发松散地扎在脑后，几缕发丝修饰脸庞。她神情自信，带着冷静的杂志大片感凝视镜头。场景透过玻璃拍摄，营造出层叠的倒影、微妙的重影以及城市景观的透明叠加效果。长曝光捕捉到的交通灯光在画面中划出鲜艳的红、橙、白、青色光轨，柔和的霓虹灯和模糊的车灯营造出电影般的焦外成像效果。混合了 环境暮光 与店面灯光，为面部带来柔和的光泽，平衡了冷暖色调。高端奢侈时尚广告审美，Vogue 杂志摄影风格，构图自然且精致，浅景深，柔和的胶片颗粒感，真实的皮肤质感，光学镜头反光，自然色彩分级，Leica SL2-S，Summilux 50mm f/1.4 镜头，Kodak Portra 400 色调，超写实，HDR，8K，杰作。
